text: Our office hours are from 9 AM to 5 PM.
We deliver products across UAE within 2 business days.
Customer support email is help@company.com.
Our customer support hotline is available 24/7 at +971-4-XXX-XXXX for urgent inquiries.
We offer free shipping on orders above AED 200 within UAE mainland.
Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase with original receipt and packaging.
We accept payments via credit card, debit card, cash on delivery, and Apple Pay.
Our main office is located in Dubai Marina, Building 5, Floor 12, Office 1203.
Weekend hours are Saturday and Sunday from 10 AM to 3 PM. We are closed on public holidays.
Express delivery is available for an additional AED 50 and guarantees next-day delivery within Dubai.
We have a loyalty program where customers earn 1 point for every AED 10 spent. 100 points equals AED 10 discount.
All products come with a standard 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects and malfunctions.
International shipping is available to GCC countries with delivery in 5-7 business days.
Our live chat support is available on our website from 9 AM to 9 PM daily.
We offer installation services for electronics and appliances for AED 100-300 depending on the product.
Price matching is available if you find the same product cheaper elsewhere. Terms and conditions apply.
Students and educators receive a 10% discount on all purchases with valid ID.
Our product catalog includes electronics, home appliances, furniture, and office supplies.
Track your order online using the tracking number sent to your email after purchase.
We have showrooms in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah. Visit our website for exact addresses.
Bulk orders of 10+ items receive a 15% discount. Contact our sales team for quotes.
Extended warranty plans are available for 2 or 3 years at purchase for an additional fee.
Our mobile app offers exclusive deals and faster checkout. Available on iOS and Android.
Gift wrapping is available for AED 15 per item. Perfect for birthdays and special occasions.
Cancel your order free of charge within 2 hours of placing it if it hasn't shipped yet.
Subscribe to our newsletter for 5% off your first order and weekly deals.
Our customer service team speaks Arabic, English, Hindi, and Urdu.
Same-day delivery is available for orders placed before 12 PM in Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
Damaged items during delivery can be reported within 48 hours for free replacement.
We price our products competitively and offer best value guarantee in the market.
Corporate accounts are available with NET 30 payment terms and dedicated account managers.
Our eco-friendly packaging initiative uses 100% recyclable materials for all shipments.
Follow us on Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter @companyname for latest updates and promotions.
Product assembly services are available for furniture items starting at AED 150.
We offer trade-in programs for old electronics with up to 20% value towards new purchases.
All refunds are processed within 7-10 business days to the original payment method.
Personal shopping assistance is available by appointment for customized product recommendations.
Our website uses 256-bit SSL encryption to ensure secure transactions and data protection.
Seasonal sales occur during Ramadan, National Day, Black Friday, and New Year with up to 50% off.
Product specifications, user manuals, and setup guides are available for download on our website.
We partner with leading brands including Samsung, LG, Sony, Apple, and Bosch.
Parking is available at all our showroom locations with designated customer parking spots.
Gift cards are available in denominations of AED 100, 250, 500, and 1000 with no expiry date.
Technical support for products is available via phone, email, or in-person at service centers.
Our inventory is updated daily on the website showing real-time stock availability.
Pre-orders are accepted for new product launches with a 10% deposit. Balance due upon release.
We maintain a 98% customer satisfaction rating based on verified customer reviews.
Senior citizens aged 60+ receive a 5% discount on all purchases every Tuesday.
Our FAQ section on the website covers common questions about orders, shipping, and returns.
We are committed to customer privacy and never share personal information with third parties.
